content.title: Dhul Hijjah — The Best Season of Ibadah!
content.subtitle: A great opportunity for Sadaqah Jariyah is waiting for you! ✨
content.body:
Imagine this —

A library where millions of people come every day just to recite the Quran, read Tafsir, and learn duas. And somewhere behind this library, there is a small contribution from you. Every act of worship happening there — a portion of its reward is being added to your book of deeds. You may be busy at work, or even asleep. Yet because of your support, people are reciting Quran and memorizing duas… and you continue earning rewards even while sleeping. How would that feel?

This is not imagination. This is Muslims Day!

.

In just the last 1 month, users of Muslims Day collectively spent more than 33 years inside the app! Meaning, within a single month alone, the equivalent of 33 years was spent in worship and seeking Islamic knowledge through Muslims Day.

Behind this app is a dedicated team of around 15 people with one mission — to reach 10 million people within the next 6 months with this light of guidance. But accomplishing this mission alone is nearly impossible for our team.

That’s why we are looking for just 2,000 Ansar supporters to join this mission. Would you like to be one of them?

What will you receive as an Ansar member?

✦ Ongoing rewards (Sadaqah Jariyah) from the worship of millions of Muslims

✦ Premium subscriptions to all 7 Muslims Day apps + 1 Mahfil subscription — completely ad-free

✦ And most importantly — an investment for your Akhirah that never loses value

Only 500 BDT per month. For the price of a cup of coffee, your contribution can benefit the Ummah in countless ways.

Limited seats available. Only around ~1,900 spots remaining.

👇 One small step from you could become a source of guidance for millions.

footer_button.hint: Take this opportunity to join the mission of bringing Muslims Day to millions of Muslims worldwide! Limited seats available!
